creator: ngie@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Dec 9, 2012, at 2:04 AM, Baptiste Daroussin wrote:

> I can't reproduce, looks strange to me.

May or may not be bmake's fault; I'm using CURRENT with a modified ports =
tree (:U/:L -> :tu/:tl) and with minor ports modifications, but no major =
changes in the infrastructure area.
Thanks!
-Garrett
